description: QA for the vault eval. Gold ids: 'note:<relpath>' (any chunk of that note counts as a hit) or 'conv:<turn_id>'. Categories: single_note (answer in one note), cross_note (answer spans linked notes), attachment (answer lives ONLY in conversation turns about vault entities - the cross-corpus test).
